message:
feat(status): implement --agent filter for wa status pane listing

The --agent flag on wa status was a no-op TODO. Now filters panes by
inferred agent type from title (codex, claude_code, gemini) with
case-insensitive matching, consistent with the detection logic in
environment::detect_agent_from_title.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
